lines.english: Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, I live.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
My karma is perfect, O my God. ||1||
Please, listen to this prayer, O my God.
Please keep me under Your Protection, O God, O Great Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਿ ਅਪਣੇ ਚੇਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dehi naam kar apane chere |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Please bless me with Your Name, and make me Your chaylaa, Your disciple. ||1||Pause||
By Guru's Grace, a few people understand this. ||2||
May Your Lotus Feet abide within my consciousness. ||3||
Please hear my prayer, O God, my Friend.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
may I never forget You, O perfect treasure of virtue. ||4||18||24||
Nanak makes one prayer:
He is my friend, companion, child, relative and sibling.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤ ਕਤ ਪੇਖਉ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jat kat pekhau har sang sahaaee |1|
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see the Lord as my companion and helper. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤਿ ਮੇਰੀ ਪਤਿ ਮੇਰੀ ਧਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: jat meree pat meree dhan har naam |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is my social status, my honor and wealth.
He is my pleasure, poise, bliss and peace. ||1||Pause||
It cannot be pierced, even by millions of weapons. ||2||
I have strapped on the armor of meditation on the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਕੰਟਕੁ ਜਮੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਨ ਬਿਦਾਰੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaal kanttak jam tis na bidaarai |3|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death, the torturer, cannot demolish it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨ ਸਰਣ ਗੜ ਕੋਟ ਹਮਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: har charan saran garr kott hamaarai |
lines.english: The Sanctuary of the Lord's Feet is my fortress and battlement.
Slave Nanak is forever a sacrifice
to the selfless servants and Saints of the Sovereign Lord, the Destroyer of ego. ||4||19||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਨਿਤ ਗਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: gun gopaal prabh ke nit gaahaa |
lines.english: Where the Glorious Praises of God, the Lord of the world are continually sung,
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
there is bliss, joy, happiness and peace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਚਰਣੀ ਪਾਹਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadh janaa kee charanee paahaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Let us fall at the feet of the holy, humble beings. ||1||Pause||
Come, O my companions - let us go and enjoy God.
It shall wash away the sins of countless incarnations. ||2||
I pray for the dust of the feet of the humble.
I dedicate my mind, body, breath of life and soul to God.
O Lord, O Merciful to the meek, please give me faith and confidence,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਮਾਨੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਕਟਾਹਾਂ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har simar simar maan mohu kattaahaan |3|
lines.english: Remembering the Lord in meditation, I have eradicated pride and emotional attachment. ||3||
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
The city of heaven is where the Saints dwell.
so that slave Nanak may remain absorbed in Your Sanctuary. ||4||20||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਬਿੰਜਨ ਤੁਝੁ ਭੋਗ ਭੁੰਚਾਵਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har anik binjan tujh bhog bhunchaavau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: so that you may eat and enjoy the various delicacies of the Lord||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਤੁਝੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਦਿਖਲਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: sun man tan tujh sukh dikhalaavau |
lines.english: Listen, O my mind and body, and let me show you the way to find peace,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਰਿਦ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਵਾਸਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: prabh charan kamal rid maeh nivaasaa |1|
lines.english: They enshrine the Lotus Feet of God within their hearts. ||1||
Taste the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਰਜ ਸਾਦ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਬਰਨੇ ਨ ਜਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: acharaj saad taa ke barane na jaahee |2|
lines.english: Its taste is wondrous - it cannot be described. ||2||
Your greed shall die, and your thirst shall be quenched.
The humble beings seek the Sanctuary of the Supreme Lord God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਭੈ ਮੋਹ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke bhai moh nivaare |
lines.english: The Lord dispels the fears and attachments of countless incarnations.
Soohee, Fifth Mehl:
God has showered His Mercy and Grace upon slave Nanak. ||4||21||27||
God covers the many shortcomings of His slaves.
You emancipate Your humble servant,
Granting His Mercy, God makes them His own. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਰਝਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਜਾਲੁ ਜਗੁ ਸੁਪਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aurajh pario jaal jag supanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and rescue him from the noose of the world, which is just a dream. ||1||Pause||
Even huge mountains of sin and corruption
are removed in an instant by the Merciful Lord. ||2||
Bestowing His Glance of Grace, He attaches us to the hem of His robe.
Sorrow, disease and the most terrible calamities
are removed by meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||3||
